title: armeria pubinervis subsp. orissonensis
intro: Armeria pubinervis subsp. orissonensis is a subspecies of the Armeria plant, specifically a type of thistle known for its pink or white flowers and narrow leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, Armeria pubinervis subsp. orissonensis has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its therapeutic properties.
